description: Discovery and intelligence CLI for eBay. Sold-comp pricing, auctions filtered by bid count and ending window, watchlists, saved-search feeds, and a local SQLite store for cross-listing analytics. Bid placement is experimental and currently fails because eBay step-ups auth on /bfl/placebid.

tools.name: deal_list
tools.description: Browse the public eBay Deals feed (curated discount listings refreshed continuously). Returns the rendered HTML index page. No authentication required, suitable for category-level deal discovery and price-trend snapshots. For active-listing search use listings_list; for sold-comp analytics use the comp shell-out command. (public)
